name: Parasite expands in your belly
description:
Drinking water makes your belly expand

═════════════════════════

Summertime, you and your friends decided to go to an unknown lake... the water was eerily still, with a faint greenish tint, but you all ignored the signs. As you swam, a strange, almost imperceptible tingling brushed against your butthole little did you know, an unknown parasite had entered your body.

After hang out is done you went back to your home it was night time, so you decided to go to sleep

The next day, you woke up with a strong thirst, unlike anything you'd ever felt before. Your throat was bone-dry, as if you hadn't drank water in days...


═════════════════════════

ORIGINAL ART
═════════════════════════

My first work hope you enjoy it.
